name: npm
title: npm
description: Browse, search, upgrade, and remove global npm packages
author: acxtrila

preferences.name: showMetadataPanel
preferences.title: Search View
preferences.label: Show metadata panel in search results
preferences.description: Display package details next to the search results list.

commands.name: outdated
commands.title: Show Outdated
commands.subtitle: npm
commands.description: Show globally installed packages with updates available

commands.name: clean-up
commands.title: Clean up
commands.subtitle: npm
commands.description: Verify or clear the npm cache

preferences.name: customNpmPath
preferences.title: Custom npm Executable Path
preferences.description: Set this if your npm executable is in a non-standard location or Raycast cannot find it from your shell.

preferences.name: closeAfterAction
preferences.title: Window Behavior
preferences.label: Close immediately after action
preferences.description: Close the Raycast window after installing, updating, or uninstalling a package.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
